titleStmt.title: SII 22.317: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 317. (A.R. No. 317 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—21st YEAR (A.D. 1032-33)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. It is left incomplete with the mention of some provision by way of land gift for the expenses of a festival (?) on the day of dvādaśī in the Mārgaḻi month every year in the temple of Perumānaḍigaḷ “who was pleased to reside at Gōvindapāḍi”.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porcceyappāvaiyum cirttaṉiccelviyum taṉperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭuntaṭuntaṉatūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻat
taraicarta muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=tiranāramum teṇṭicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velaitto
l peruṅkāval palapaḻan=tivum ceṟuviṟcinavil Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmar mevaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tirut takumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimikamuyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷicca cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷap perum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyar Iraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum navaneti ku
lap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutiraivaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷi yum mācaṭaippaḻan mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyil can=tiran tolkulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittu niṟaitaṉakuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñceṟimiḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurar cer nal kocalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai maḻuttu vaṇṭuṟai colai taṇṭa puttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākki tikkaṇaikirtati takkaṇalāṭamum kovinta cantaṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mayipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi tiṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa luttaralāṭamum veṟimalarttirtta te
ṟipuṉaṟkaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭp palakalañ celutti(ccelutti) caṅkirāmavijayatuṅka paṉmmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayamporukaṭal paṭutturimaiyiṟpiṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Ārttavanakaneka
porttoḻilvācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijaiyamum tu ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ mātamliṅkamum
kalaṅkāvalviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟuniṟaipunal māpappāḷamum kānalam puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai kalaittakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalviṉai mātamali
ṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭun=tiṟal Ilāmuritecamum tenakkavārpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesarivanma yāṇṭu 2 10 1- ṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaiiṟkoṭṭattup puricaināṭṭu śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiya perumā naṭakaḷukku mārkaḻi dvādaśikku nivantattukku veṇṭum nilaṅ koḷḷavenStops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 22.317 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
